verse.name: V1
verse.lines: There is a longing only You can fill A raging tempest only You can still My soul is thirsty Lord to know You as I'm known Drink from the river that flows before Your throne

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Take me deeper, deeper in love with You Jesus hold me close in Your embrace Take me deeper, deeper than I've ever been before I just want to love You more and more How I long to be deeper in love

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Sunrise to sunrise I will seek Your face Drawn by the Spirit to the promise of Your grace My heart has found in You a hope that will abide Here in Your presence forever satisfied
